name: s2-hanzi-ambient-renderer
description: Native renderer for S2 Hanzi Ambient UI. Translates spatial logic and emotions into dynamic Chinese ideographic morphing.

DISPLAY_PANEL_IP.description: Local IP Address of your Hanzi Ambient Smart Panel or Hologram (e.g., 192.168.1.150).

RENDER_THEME.description: Set the default rendering style: 'ink_wash' (水墨), 'cyberpunk' (赛博霓虹), or 'minimalist' (极简流体).

S2_PRIVACY_CONSENT.description: Set to '1' to allow local emotional telemetry processing for Hanzi morphing.

author: Space2.world
